decompile_aligned_native_contexts.important_caveat: Code RED raw disassembly confirms native operand bytes and nearby constants. Native names such as ADD_ITEM and _SET_INVENTORY_NEXT_USE_SLOT are aligned with external decompile context, not embedded as names in these raw WSC reports.

answers.a_main_z_grants_dlc_deed_items_by_add_it: not_proven. main_z has a larger decompile-aligned ADD_ITEM candidate switch/function, but the four DLC horse deed names were not found in main_z strings and no HORSE_*_Z numeric item constants were proven from bytecode in this pass.
answers.b_main_z_initializes_dlc_inventory_or_gr: supported. main_z raw strings include ZombiePackGringos and direct DLC/ZombiePack gringo path strings near the deed-array initialization area.
answers.c_main_z_unlocks_dlc_deed_flags: possible but not proven. Function_19 contains unlock_help strings and repeated native calls, but ownership of DLC horse deed unlock flags is not proven.
answers.d_normal_main_already_calls_dlc_init_but: partially supported. normal main has deed-array initialization but no literal HORSE_*_Z strings; DLC-specific gringo path evidence is stronger in main_z and XML registration.
answers.e_horse_deed_generic: strongly supported by strings: horse_deed.wsc contains ActorEnum, ItemAttribs, own_new_horse, SettingPlayerHorse, NewPlayerHorse_Wipe, WasPlayerMount, and ItemSave, while each DLC horse deed XML points to the same Horse_Deed script and passes a different ActorEnum.
answers.f_dlc_gringo_xml_original_path_needed: supported as safest assumption. dlc_inventory.xml GringoTypeName values and zombiepackgringos.txt both register the original DLC/ZombiePack/gringos/horse_deed_*_z.xml paths; moving/renaming is not the first safe strategy.

decompile_boolean_warning: The raw candidate contexts use compact VM operands such as RawOp139/140/143, PushS8, Call2, and Native operand bytes. This pass does not prove that MagicRDR boolean-looking ADD_ITEM arguments are trustworthy numeric item IDs. Treat boolean rendering as display ambiguity until native argument reconstruction is improved.

safest_one_item_proof_candidate.reason: It is the first DLC deed entry, has a normal non-Z cousin HORSE_WAR in inventory.xml, preserves the original DLC gringo path, and uses the generic Horse_Deed script with ActorEnum=RIDEABLE_ANIMAL_EVIL_Horse_War.
safest_one_item_proof_candidate.suggested_later_strategy: XML/register one deed first while preserving GringoTypeName=$\content\DLC\ZombiePack\gringos\Horse_Deed_War_Z. Do not patch main.wsc ADD_ITEM constants until an exact DLC item constant/name mapping is proven.
